title: podman pull from dockerhub fails - error reading manifest
body:
Containers built with buildah and pushed to dockerhub through podman, are not able to pull from dockerhub.
Throwing following error:
[root@kvm docker]# podman pull docker.io/trilio/trilio-datamover:testosp16
Trying to pull docker.io/trilio/trilio-datamover:testosp16...ERRO[0000] Error pulling image ref //trilio/trilio-datamover:testosp16: Error initializing source docker://trilio/trilio-datamover:testosp16: Error reading manifest testosp16 in docker.io/trilio/trilio-datamover: manifest unknown: manifest unknown
Failed
Error: error pulling image "docker.io/trilio/trilio-datamover:testosp16": unable to pull docker.io/trilio/trilio-datamover:testosp16: unable to pull image: Error initializing source docker://trilio/trilio-datamover:testosp16: Error reading manifest testosp16 in docker.io/trilio/trilio-datamover: manifest unknown: manifest unknown


Steps to reproduce:
1. Build a container using buildah tool
2. Push that conatiner to dockerhub private repo, using podman
3. Now try to pull that conatiner using podman. It fails with above error.

Expected result:
Podman pull from dockerhub should work.

Actual Result:
Podman pull from dockerhub is failing

Podman version:
[root@kvm docker]# podman --version
podman version 1.4.4

Base OS version:
RHEL8

My bad. It was incorrect tag I was using to pull the image.
